Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.general_idea: Decompose the monolithic Controller class into a thin orchestrator and multiple focused sub-controllers to improve modularity and maintainability.
Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.human_impl: Extracted logic into FloorController, RoomController, SellingController, etc., and updated Controller to instantiate and delegate to them.

Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.general_idea: Mark core dependency fields as final to ensure they are initialized once and cannot be reassigned, improving code safety.
Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.human_impl: Added 'final' keyword to motelManager and userInterface fields.

Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.general_idea: Add robustness to startup by validating the configured printer and automatically falling back to the first available printer if the configured one is missing.
Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.human_impl: Added check in start() using motelManager.isPrinterAvailable() and setFirstAvailablePrinter() with user notification.

Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.general_idea: Determine the initial application view based on whether a valid previous turn exists, guiding the user to either floor view or turn selection.
Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.human_impl: Added logic in start() to call prepareTurnRegisterData() and set view accordingly.

Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.general_idea: Move event listener registration from the main controller to respective sub-controllers to align with the new modular architecture.
Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.human_impl: Created setupListeners() method that calls initListeners() on each sub-controller.

Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.general_idea: Centralize the creation and starting of application timers in a dedicated method for better organization.
Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.human_impl: Created startTimers() method to instantiate and start Timer objects for updates, backups, and floor changes.

Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.general_idea: Update the time tick handler to delegate UI updates to specific sub-controllers based on the currently active view.
Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.human_impl: Rewrote updateTime() to call floorController.updateRoomButtons() or roomController.updateRoomView() conditionally.

Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.general_idea: Rename the file saving method to clarify its purpose as a backup operation rather than general file saving.
Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.human_impl: Renamed method to saveBackupFiles(String saveType) and updated call site.

Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Mot.general_idea: Add org.json library for JSON parsing and generation.
Add DTO classes for type-safe data transfer.
Implement MotelManagement class with state management for rooms, turns, and inventory.
Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Mot.human_impl: public class MotelManagement { private final ArrayList<ArrayList<ArrayList<Room>>> rooms; ... }

Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Mot.general_idea: Implement printer configuration and selection functionality.
Implement floor and tower selection interface logic.
Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Mot.human_impl: public void setCurrentFloorRoom(int tower, int floor, int room) { ... }

Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Mot.general_idea: Implement basic printing functions for transactions and turns.
Implement basic file reading for application properties and room data.
Implement GUI inventory modificators for adding, removing, and updating items.
Implement turn history management and printing.
Implement room change functionality between towers/floors.

Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Tur.general_idea: Added import for org.json.JSONArray to handle JSON array operations.
Added import for org.json.JSONException to handle JSON parsing exceptions.
Added import for org.json.JSONObject to handle JSON object operations.
Added import for model.dto.TurnActivityData to use the new DTO class.
Added import for model.dto.TurnSummaryItemData to use the new DTO class.
Added import for model.RoomStatus to check room status codes.
Added import for java.time.Instant to handle time points.
Added import for java.time.ZoneId to handle time zones.
Added import for java.time.ZonedDateTime to handle date-time with zone.
Added import for java.util.ArrayList to store lists of DTOs.
Added import for java.util.List to define return types for DTO lists.
Implemented the Turn class with fields, constructors, and methods for managing turn history, room changes, and sales transactions using JSON.
Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Tur.human_impl: public class Turn { private Instant start; ... public Turn(Instant start, ZoneId zoneID) { ... } ... }

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.general_idea: Replace NetBeans Matisse GroupLayout with JFormDesigner MigLayout to modernize the GUI construction and improve maintainability.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.human_impl: Replaced `javax.swing.GroupLayout` logic with `MigLayout` constraints and component initialization code.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.general_idea: Introduce MigLayout library as a dependency for the new GUI layout manager.
Add input filtering to the price text field to ensure only numeric values are entered.
Rename GUI components to reflect updated business logic (e.g., changing 6-hour booking to 24-hour).
Expose private GUI components via public getter methods to allow controller access.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.human_impl: Added public getter methods for all UI components like `getRoomNumber()`, `getPriceTextField()`, etc.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Room.general_idea: Remove unused or renamed components from the previous GUI version.

Motel_management/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
Add org.json library for JSON parsing capabilities.
Add MigLayout core library for GUI layout management.
Add iText7 core library for PDF generation.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to enforce Java 21 compilation settings.
Configure maven-jar-plugin to set the main class in the manifest.
Configure maven-shade-plugin to create an executable uber-jar with dependencies.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the data directory to .gitignore to prevent committing local state files.
Add the backup directory to .gitignore to exclude local backups from version control.
Add the history directory to .gitignore to exclude local history logs from version control.
Add the receiptPrints directory to .gitignore to exclude generated print files from version control.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Turn.general_idea: Add a time label component to the GUI form.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Turn.human_impl: Added <Component class="javax.swing.JLabel" name="timeLabel"> with font and text properties.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Turn.general_idea: Add a date label component to the GUI form.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Turn.human_impl: Added <Component class="javax.swing.JLabel" name="dateLabel"> with font and text properties.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Turn.general_idea: Restructure the DimensionLayout to accommodate the new time and date labels alongside existing buttons.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Turn.human_impl: Modified Group type="102" and type="103" structures in dim="0" and dim="1" to include timeLabel and dateLabel.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Turn.general_idea: Remove the action performed event handler from the turn2Button.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/Turn.human_impl: Removed <Events> block containing turn2ButtonActionPerformed from turn2Button component.
